
---
title: "Parnell Reproductive Report"
subtitle: "Reproductive Performance Summary"
author: "<img src='images/parnell.jpeg' width='150' /> <br> Sarah Hills"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: false
    code-fold: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
  echo: false
embed-resources: true
params:
  event: 
    label: "Farm Name:"
    value: "Monte Vista"
    input: text
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  broom,
  tidyverse,
  dtplyr,
  gt,
  arrow,
  rmarkdown,
  lubridate,
  quarto, 
  arrow,
  survival,
  survminer,
  ggsurvfit,
  flextable,
  gtsummary,
  marginaleffects,
  scales,
  zoo,
  here
  )

events_formatted <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/events_formatted.parquet'))

animals <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/animals.parquet'))

animal_lactations<-read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/animal_lactations.parquet'))

# load GC's functions
source(here::here("functions/fxn_load_os_fxns.R"))
fxn_load_os_fxns()

source('functions/fxn_denos_sarah.R')
herd_deno <- fxn_denos_sarah(
  lact_data = animal_lactations, 
  events_df = events_formatted, 
  animal_data = animals)

source('functions/fxn_denominators_monthly.R')
monthly_deno_data <- fxn_get_monthly_denominators(animal_lactations, animals)

# Load Parnell CR fucntions from Github
cr_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ParnellPharma/ParnellFunctionsPublic/main/parnell_calculate_CR_master.R"
source(cr_url)

# create variables for inline code
farm_name <- unique(events_formatted$location_event)

date_max_pull <- max(events_formatted$date_event, na.rm = TRUE)
date_min_pull <- date_max_pull - years(2)


# If a parameter was passed, use it. Otherwise, pull from the data.
farm_name <- if (!is.null(params$event) && params$event != "") {
  params$event
} else {
  unique(events_formatted$location_event)[1]
}

# 2. Clean the string for display
farm_name <- basename(farm_name)
farm_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(farm_name)
farm_name <- str_replace_all(farm_name, "[_|-]", " ") |> str_to_title()

```



```{r}
#| label: Eligibility
#| echo: false

# Eligibility - Cows LACT>0 (?) with DIM > VWP who are active during 21 day period.
vwp <- 60 

periods_df <- tibble(
  period_id = 1:24,
  period_end = date_max_pull - (0:23 * 21),
  period_start = date_max_pull - (0:23 * 21) - 20
)

# Ensure date_archive is set to date_max_pull if NA
herd_intervals <- animal_lactations |>
  filter(lact_number > 0) |> 
  select(id_animal_lact, date_fresh, date_archive) |>
  mutate(date_archive = if_else(is.na(date_archive), date_max_pull, date_archive))

eligible_cows_by_period <- periods_df |>
  cross_join(herd_intervals) |>
  filter(
    date_fresh <= period_end,
    date_archive >= period_start,
    as.numeric(period_start - date_fresh) > vwp
  ) |>
  # This grouping is the key:
  # It isolates the de-duplication to JUST this period for JUST this cow
  group_by(period_id, id_animal_lact) |> 
  # We pick the row with the most recent fresh date, 
  # because that is the most relevant lactation for that period.
  slice_max(date_fresh, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup()

eligible_summary <- eligible_cows_by_period |>
  group_by(period_id, period_start, period_end) |>
  summarise(eligible_count = n(), .groups = "drop")

eligible_summary |>
  arrange(desc(period_start)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Eligible Cows per 21-Day Period")

#IR - Out of the cows that were eligible to be bred, how many were bred?

breeding_events <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event == "BRED") |> 
  select(id_animal_lact, date_event, event)

bred_flags <- breeding_events |>
  cross_join(periods_df) |>
  filter(
    date_event >= period_start,
    date_event <= period_end
  ) |>
  # Ensure we only have one row per cow per period
  distinct(id_animal_lact, period_id) |>
  mutate(is_bred = TRUE)

bred_report <- eligible_cows_by_period |>
  left_join(bred_flags, by = c("id_animal_lact", "period_id")) |>
  mutate(
    # If the join found a match, is_bred is TRUE; otherwise it's FALSE
    is_bred = replace_na(is_bred, FALSE)
  )

ir_summary <- bred_report |>
  group_by(period_id, period_start, period_end) |>
  summarise(
    n_eligible = n(),
    n_bred = sum(is_bred),
    insemination_rate = n_bred / n_eligible,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Display as a formatted table
ir_summary |>
  arrange(desc(period_start)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Insemination Rate Report",
    subtitle = "Calculated per 21-Day Period"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    period_id = "Period",
    period_start = "Start",
    period_end = "End",
    n_eligible = "Eligible Cows",
    n_bred = "Bred Cows",
    insemination_rate = "IR %"
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = insemination_rate, decimals = 1)

#CR - Out of the cows that were bred, how many were called pregnant?

# PR - Out of the cows that were eligible to be bred, how many were called pregnant?


# Abortion Rate - Out of the cows that were called pregnant, how many aborted?
  # What was the distribution of abortion events over dim?


```
